mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ITEM
STATUS = 'N'
STATUS = 'E'
STATUS = 'Y'
ITEM_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RNUM, A.* FROM ( SELECT i.*, (SELECT img_url FROM ITEM_IMG WHERE ITEM_NO = i.ITEM_NO AND ROWNUM = 1) AS MAIN_IMG FROM ITEM i
STATUS = 'N'
STATUS = 'E'
STATUS = 'Y'
ITEM_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY ITEM_NO DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{offset} + #{limit} ) WHERE RNUM > #{offset}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_ITEM_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ITEM ( ITEM_NO, ITEM_TITLE, ITEM_CONTENT, ITEM_SIZE, START_PRICE, DIRECT_BUY, BUY_NOW_PRICE, CURRENT_PRICE, END_TIME, ITEM_CD_NO, USER_NO, COUNTRY_NO, STATUS, START_TIME, CREATE_AT ) VALUES ( #{itemNo}, #{itemTitle}, #{itemContent}, #{itemSize}, #{startPrice}, #{directBuy}, #{buyNowPrice}, #{startPrice}, #{endTime}, #{itemCdNo}, #{userNo}, #{countryNo}, 'N', SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ITEM_IMG WHERE ITEM_NO = #{itemNo} ORDER BY ITEM_IMG_NO ASC
